items.title: Morgan Stanley’s E*TRADE launches spot crypto trading through Zero Hash
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's entry into crypto trading via E*TRADE enhances institutional engagement, potentially increasing liquidity and interest in Solana's ecosystem.

items.title: BNB’s $931M burn strengthens tokenomics – Can Solana’s RWA boom keep pace?
items.whyYouShouldCare: BNB's significant token burn highlights the importance of strong tokenomics, raising questions about Solana's ability to maintain competitive growth in real-world asset applications.

items.title: Wall Street moves on-chain: JPMorgan tokenizes QQQ, and 50+ firms are next
items.whyYouShouldCare: JPMorgan's move to tokenize QQQ signals a shift towards on-chain finance, which could drive demand for Solana's infrastructure and applications in the financial sector.
